title: Akua User-Input Extensions for JSON Schema
description: Documents the x-user-input and x-input extensions that Akua uses on JSON Schema property definitions to mark customer-configurable values and declare input-time transforms. Placeholder — formal spec lands in v4.

^x-user-input$.description: Marks a property as customer-configurable at install time. Boolean true means render this field in the deploy form.

order.description: Display order hint. Lower values render first.

^x-input$.description: Input-time transform and validation config. Orthogonal fields, each opt-in.

template.description: Template applied to user input. Supports {{value}} (current field), {{fields.*}} (other user-input fields), {{install.*}} (install metadata like id, region, workspaceId).

slugify.description: Apply RFC 1123 DNS-label slugification (lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphen, 63 char max).

uniqueIn.description: Registry name for uniqueness check (e.g., 'hostname'). Empty means no uniqueness check.
